subject: A grand city of towers and arches perched above a great waterfall, with a beam of light descending from the sky onto the central spire
description: A vast fantasy city of pale stone towers, domes, and arched bridges rises along a cliffside, with cascading waterfalls pouring from its base into a wide blue river below. A vertical column of bright light descends from a circular opening in the dark, clouded sky onto the tallest central spire, suggesting a divine or planar event. The cityscape is rendered in cool blues and steel-greys, with mist rising from the falls and indistinct architectural detail receding into atmospheric haze. The composition is wide and panoramic with no visible figures.
foreground: blue river and mist below cascading waterfalls
background: spired city with descending beam of light under a stormy sky
emotion: awe; sense of cosmic event over a populated landscape
